contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 5
- Description: Diagnosed and resolved dao_members.json regression where only ~18 key-holders appeared instead of all 409 DAO contributors.
  
  Identified the issue as stale Google Apps Script deployments: the same DaoMembersCache.js was deployed at multiple versions, with sentiment_importer pointing to an old deployment (@19) that lacked the Pass-2 Contact sheet seeding. Directed AI agent to use clasp to redeploy all 6 stale deployments to latest version (@24-@29), resolving the intermittent 18-contributor commits.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 8.33
